clinical_note: Neurology prior-auth request for erenumab (Aimovig). Patient: Greta Lowe, age 48. Diagnosis: episodic migraine without chronic migraine features. Migraine headache days per month: 16. Failed triptan trials: 2. Failed preventive medication trials: 1. Requesting Aimovig for migraine prevention.

payer_policy.rules: Coverage requires chronic migraine diagnosis, at least 15 migraine days per month, documented failure of at least 2 triptans, and failure of at least 1 preventive migraine medication.
